# VerifCPU filelists — generated by tools/gen_filelist.py
# Run from verif_cpu_verilog/

# === work/  (회사 SoC 통합용 — TB 없음) ===
#   work/vcpu.f   VCPU IP만
#   work/rtl.f    vcpu + AMBA bridge + soc_cell (+ connect.vh)
#   iverilog -g2012 -f filelists/incdirs.f -f filelists/work/rtl.f

# === test/  (패키지 내부 검증·참고 TB) ===
#   test/tb_dut.f        ./example.sh sim (simple_soc + full_campaign)
#   test/soc_manifest.f  make soc-manifest (bridge 배선 참고)

# EDA split: filelists/eda/work/integration/*.list
#             filelists/eda/test/<view>/*.list

#   incdirs.f                        shared include dirs
#   work/vcpu.f                      Work — VCPU IP (core + pool + orchestrator + agent)
#   work/rtl.f                       Work — real SoC attach (vcpu + bridges + soc_cell + connect VH)
#   test/tb_dut.f                    Test — internal regression (rtl + simple_soc + tb_full_campaign)
#   test/soc_manifest.f              Test — bridge wiring reference (tb_soc_manifest)
#   vcpu.f                           vcpu.f → work/vcpu.f
#   rtl.f                            rtl.f → work/rtl.f
#   tb_dut.f                         tb_dut.f → test/tb_dut.f
#   integration_dut.f                integration_dut.f → work/rtl.f
#   full_campaign.f                  full_campaign.f → test/tb_dut.f
#   soc_manifest.f                   soc_manifest.f → test/soc_manifest.f
#   work/verdi_rtl.f                 Verdi — Work — VerifCPU RTL for customer SoC (no TB)
#   test/verdi_full_campaign.f       Verdi — Test — internal regression (simple_soc + full_campaign)
#   test/verdi_soc_manifest.f        Verdi — Test — bridge wiring reference (tb_soc_manifest)
#   eda/work/integration/tb_top.list empty (integration DUT)
#   eda/work/integration/incdirs.list Include search paths (+incdir+)
#   eda/work/integration/vcpu.list   VCPU RTL — verif_cpu_core + bus/pool/recorder
#   eda/work/integration/rtl.list    Platform RTL — Work — customer SoC (RTL only, no TB)
#   eda/work/integration/defines.list defines + header deps (comments)
#   eda/work/integration/top.txt     top module: verif_vcpu_soc_cell
#   eda/work/integration/manifest.list ordered -F bundle
#   eda/test/full_campaign/incdirs.list Include search paths (+incdir+)
#   eda/test/full_campaign/vcpu.list VCPU RTL — verif_cpu_core + bus/pool/recorder
#   eda/test/full_campaign/rtl.list  Platform RTL — Test — authoritative campaign TB
#   eda/test/full_campaign/tb_top.list Testbench top — tb_full_campaign
#   eda/test/full_campaign/defines.list defines + header deps (comments)
#   eda/test/full_campaign/top.txt   top module: tb_full_campaign
#   eda/test/full_campaign/vcd.txt   expected VCD path (after sim)
#   eda/test/full_campaign/manifest.list ordered -F bundle
#   eda/test/soc_manifest/incdirs.list Include search paths (+incdir+)
#   eda/test/soc_manifest/vcpu.list  VCPU RTL — verif_cpu_core + bus/pool/recorder
#   eda/test/soc_manifest/rtl.list   Platform RTL — Test — integration TB (manifest slaves)
#   eda/test/soc_manifest/tb_top.list Testbench top — tb_soc_manifest
#   eda/test/soc_manifest/defines.list defines + header deps (comments)
#   eda/test/soc_manifest/top.txt    top module: tb_soc_manifest
#   eda/test/soc_manifest/vcd.txt    expected VCD path (after sim)
#   eda/test/soc_manifest/manifest.list ordered -F bundle
#   eda/test/soc_manifest_scale/incdirs.list Include search paths (+incdir+)
#   eda/test/soc_manifest_scale/vcpu.list VCPU RTL — verif_cpu_core + bus/pool/recorder
#   eda/test/soc_manifest_scale/rtl.list Platform RTL — Test — scale integration TB
#   eda/test/soc_manifest_scale/tb_top.list Testbench top — tb_soc_manifest_scale
#   eda/test/soc_manifest_scale/defines.list defines + header deps (comments)
#   eda/test/soc_manifest_scale/top.txt top module: tb_soc_manifest_scale
#   eda/test/soc_manifest_scale/manifest.list ordered -F bundle
#   eda/test/chip_top_example/incdirs.list Include search paths (+incdir+)
#   eda/test/chip_top_example/vcpu.list VCPU RTL — verif_cpu_core + bus/pool/recorder
#   eda/test/chip_top_example/rtl.list Platform RTL — Test — chip top smoke
#   eda/test/chip_top_example/tb_top.list Testbench top — chip_top_example
#   eda/test/chip_top_example/defines.list defines + header deps (comments)
#   eda/test/chip_top_example/top.txt top module: chip_top_example
#   eda/test/chip_top_example/manifest.list ordered -F bundle

# Verdi: ./scripts/verdi/rtl.sh | full_campaign.sh | soc_manifest.sh
